visual_description: A man in a dark suit stands with his back to the camera, facing rows of aquariums. A woman in a patterned top and a man in a suit and tie stand near a wooden door, partially obscured by a lampshade; the man has his hand on the woman’s shoulder. The man looks toward the woman, and both appear to be in a dimly lit indoor setting.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a low pitch and moderate pace, speaking in a neutral tone without any noticeable prosody or inflection.
